reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y ubicación. Lo único no aceptable es la escasez de espacio para los autos que hacen cola para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and location. The only unacceptable thing is the lack of space for cars queuing to load.

reviews.comment:
Siendo socia del ACA..como pedí factura y me dijeron que no me podían hacer el descuento..o factura o descuento...y el playero lo dijo de malas maneras...

(Translated by Google)
As an ACA member, I asked for a receipt and they told me they couldn't give me the discount...it was either a receipt or a discount...and the gas station attendant said it rudely...
